Website Features

Your website's success starts with AsteroBuilder

AsteroBuilder gives you everything you need to build a beautiful, fast, and search-optimized website — no coding required.

SEO-Friendly Website Builder

Create a website that's search engine friendly and drives organic traffic effortlessly.

Mobile-Friendly Designs

Explore our collection of responsive website templates, ensuring a seamless experience across all devices.

Easy To Use (Save Time)

Our builder lets you create a website in minutes, saving you time for what matters most.

Fast and Secure Hosting

Enjoy lightning-fast TTFB (Time To First Byte) in under 100ms, with free and secure SSL for your peace of mind.

Speedy Website

Experience faster image loading with our reliable CDN and expert optimization techniques.

30 Days Backups

Daily backup with 30 days backup history. Backup included all files and your website database as well.

Modern Portfolio Layouts

Build and manage an eye-catching and impressive portfolio fast and without effort.

Learn More
Useful Blog Layouts

Create an attractive and stunning journal to tell the world your wonderful stories.

Learn More
Cool Features & Elements

AsteroBuilder includes amazing features and elements to create rich and attractive pages.

Learn More
13 Headers & 5 Footers

Choose from various gorgeous header and footer styles to serve you best for your needs.

Learn More
Color & Font Options

You can either use the included color and fonts or easily add your own choices.

Learn More
Fully Responsive Layout

AsteroBuilder adapts to different screen sizes therefore it is compatible with any device.

Pricing

Experience The Best at Affordable Prices

Enjoy a free 14-day trial and experience the full service. No credit card required!

Basic Plan

₹399/mo

With an annual term (20% savings). You pay ₹4788 today.

  • 1GB Storage
  • 10GB Bandwidth
  • Free SSL
  • Caching & CDN
  • Advance SEO

Business Plan

₹599/mo

With an annual term (20% savings). You pay ₹7188 today.

  • Unlimited Storage
  • Unlimited Bandwidth
  • Free SSL
  • Caching & CDN
  • Advance SEO
See All Pricing

FAQs

Do I need coding knowledge to make website?

No, Astero Builder is designed for users without coding experience. It offers an intuitive interface for easy website creation.

Yes, you can seamlessly integrate your custom domain with your Astero Builder website.

Absolutely, Astero Builder websites are built with SEO in mind, offering easy optimization for better search engine visibility.

Yes, all Astero Builder websites are mobile-responsive for a great user experience on different devices.

While e-commerce features are not available now, we plan to introduce online store capabilities in the future.

Yes, Astero Builder is a cost-effective, user-friendly choice for small businesses aiming to establish an online presence.
